ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size according to UK standards */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* Size according to international standards */,
  "bust_chest" INTEGER /* Bust/chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size according to US standards */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* Size according to EU standards */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Size according to AU standards */,
  "asia_size" TEXT /* Size according to Asia standards */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "rise" INTEGER /* Rise measurement for pants in inches */,
  "leg_opening" INTEGER /* Leg opening measurement for pants in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Preferred UK size */,
  "bust_chest" INTEGER /* Bust/chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "preferred_fit" TEXT /* Preferred fit (e.g., regular, slim, plus) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "rise" INTEGER /* Rise measurement for pants in inches */,
  "leg_opening" INTEGER /* Leg opening measurement for pants in inches */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_purchase_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last purchased product */,
  "last_purchase_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last purchased size */,
  "size_preference_history" TEXT /* JSON array of size IDs preferred by the customer */,
  "fit_preference_history" TEXT /* JSON array of fit types preferred by the customer (e.g., regular, slim, plus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount on the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_item" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "discount_per_item" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_per_item" REAL /* Tax amount on the item */,
  "shipping_cost_per_item" REAL /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., not returned, awaiting return, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for the size standard */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Corresponding UK size */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size according to the country's standard */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size according to US standards */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* Size according to EU standards */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Size according to AU standards */,
  "asia_size" TEXT /* Size according to Asia standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., wrong size, defective item) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., awaiting return, returned, refunded) */,
  "refunded_amount" REAL /* Refunded amount to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "size_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback regarding the size of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image attached to the review */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video attached to the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
